====================================
Comments : RCA:-
Issue: Getting irrelevant location buyleads.

Offered Resolution:
As discussed with the client, it was explained that irrelevant location buyleads are received based on recent consumption. Since the selection is set to Recent + India, India-level buyleads are shown, which cannot be changed.

The client was guided to remove irrelevant cities from the seller panel. Accordingly, preference cities were reduced from 18 to 14.

He was advised to actively use buyleads and to contact support for any further issues. He was also informed to clear the outstanding payment to avoid any service disturbance.

"Sanskar Shanker(113725)" Issued Customer Ticket(9906404) On: 17-Jan-2026 14:35:56 PM
	Mail To: shubham4@indiamart.com,Shivanshu.verma1@indiamart.com
	Status : WIP
	Source Name: Board Escalations
	Comments: Mail received on CS, Ombudsperson, and Chairman Audit Committee

Re: Immediate Escalation: Unacceptable Delay and Unprofessional Conduct After Payment
Dear IndiaMART Management Team,
This email is to formally record our serious dissatisfaction and complaint regarding the irresponsible, unethical, and unprofessional services provided by your team. Due to the lack of proper enquiry verification and poor-quality leads, we were compelled to withhold the payment. Despite clearly addressing these concerns and requesting corrective measures for higher-quality enquiries, your team instead downgraded our service package from Leader to Star without justification, which is completely unacceptable.
We categorically state that we are authorised to sell our products only within the state of Karnataka. However, we have repeatedly received irrelevant leads from Delhi, Jammu & Kashmir, and other non-serviceable regions, making the service unusable and financially damaging. This reflects a total failure in your lead-filtering, compliance, and consultancy processes.
Such practices raise serious ethical and governance concerns and appear to be a pattern where customers are abruptly pushed to lower packages without valid reasons. This has resulted in business loss, wasted resources, and reputational harm to our organisation.
Holding the payment was a direct consequence of your service deficiency, not a default on our part. Furthermore, we strongly believe that the consultancy and services provided were misrepresented and misleading, for which compensation is warranted.
We therefore demand the following:
1. Immediate written clarification for the unjustified downgrade from Leader to Star
2. Restoration of our original service plan or a full service correction limited strictly to Karnataka leads
3. Compensation for losses incurred due to irrelevant and unusable enquiries
4. A formal explanation of your internal policy for such sudden package downgrades
Failure to resolve this matter promptly will leave us with no option but to escalate the issue through appropriate legal, consumer, and regulatory forums. We also reserve the right to formally record this experience as it adversely impacts the IndiaMART brand and credibility.
Failing which, we will be constrained to initiate proceedings before the appropriate Consumer Court and legal authorities to seek justice, including recovery of service for further industry leader compensation for damages, and litigation costs. We are fully prepared to pursue this matter legally and ensure accountability for the services rendered.
This notice is issued in good faith to allow an opportunity for amicable resolution. Kindly treat this matter with urgency and respond in writing at the earliest We expect a written response and resolution on priority.
Regards,
PRECISE IINSTALLATIONS
